meaning: n.大和人,日本人的祖先,日本人,日本民族adj.日本人的,大和民族的
examples: The rest stake will be held by Nippon Cargo shareholders such as Nippon Express Co. and Yamato Holdings Co.
I did not try using Yamato.
Kure was the home base of the largest battleship ever built, the Yamato.
Space Battleship Yamato, an enormously popular manga, points to another concern of the time -- the environment.
Natume believes Yamato struck a chord with readers who were just learning about the heavy price of industrial pollution.
